displayTitle: Read the Reply, Don't Just See the Mark
kicker: PT LEVEL II // INTERPRETATION OF INDICATIONS

beats.narration: By developer time, the part has already answered. What you see is not the flaw — it's penetrant bleeding back out into a wider mark.

payload.title: READ THE REPLY
payload.sub: The indication is bleed-out from a reservoir, not the discontinuity itself.

beats.narration: So read the material first. Castings hide cold shuts, shrinkage, and porosity; wrought stock carries seams and laps; processing and service add cracks. History names the mark.

payload.heading: Material history names the flaw
payload.note: INHERENT → PROCESSING → SERVICE: EACH FAMILY, ITS OWN SIGNATURE

beats.narration: Then read four cues together. Shape names the family. Strength tracks trapped volume. Speed reveals the mouth. Persistence proves real depth.
Watch the bleed-out behave. Open flaws bloom the instant developer dries. Tight deep cracks build slowly. Wipe a real one and it refills.

payload.heading: How bleed-out separates flaws
payload.note: BLOOM FAST · BUILD SLOW · WIPE AND WATCH IT REDEVELOP

beats.narration: No single cue convicts. Appearance, timing, and persistence together identify the discontinuity — and identification always comes before evaluation.

payload.sub: Interpretation names the flaw; only then judge it against acceptance criteria.
